descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes advance to Centennial Cup final against Humboldt Broncos with 9-3 semifinal victory.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in the Centennial Cup semifinal on Thursday at the Uniplex to earn a spot in the championship final. The Sockeyes will face Humboldt Broncos on Saturday at 7:30 p.m., marking their ninth meeting in less than three weeks. Coach Orland Kurtenbach emphasized readiness after the team's rigorous three-week road schedule.

attribution.headline: It's Sockeyes and Broncos in Centennial Cup final
